dialguesToLoad.text: Where am I? What's going on?
We are inside your mind.
Mir! What are you doing here?
I am not Mir. I am the Icosahedron.
What? Why do you look like him then?
That's not important right now.
OK, you're weird.
Have some respect! I am the Icosahedron.
That name is way too long. I'll just call you Ico.
This kid... Whatever you want...
Anyway. What am I doing here? I have some butt to kick.
Really? It looked like your butt was the one getting kicked.
No, that... Yeah, you're right. Raghnall is so much stronger than us.
You're wrong, Zack. I can help you beat him.
Really? Let's go then!
What?
Just do your thing we have no time to waste.
Don't worry about that. We are out of time.
I know that's what I've been saying.
I meant that literally. I'm the source of your visions. I have some power on Time.
Hold on... I started getting visions before I found the crystal.
That is because the crystal you found under Landfall Village and the one in your chest are two parts of a whole.
I knew it felt familiar.
This crystal contains tremendous power. If you combine the crystal with the one in your chest, you will gain incredible power.
Cool let's do it.
You'll gain power, but be careful. It will only be temporary. If you combine the crystal with the one in your chest, you will gain incredible power.
As long as it's enough to beat his ass, I'm good.
